subcodes.first_line: O celestial bird and divine soul, may God strengthen thee; rely thou upon the heavenly confirmations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الطیر الملکوتی و الشخص و الرجل الالهی ایدک الله اعتمد علی التاییدات
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the power of words; of speech
